thunder-step.canonicalEvidence: The thunder can be heard from up to 300 feet away.
thunder-step.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no sound radius.
thunder-step.issue: Thunder Step's post-teleport 300-foot thunder is now represented by structured sound fields and runtime soundEmission data.
thunder-step.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by Sound Audible Radius 300 feet, Sound Source origin_space, and Sound Trigger after_teleport.
thunder-step.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding soundEmission with audibleRadius 300 feet to the runtime effect.

thunder-step.canonicalEvidence: You teleport yourself to an unoccupied space you can see within range. You can bring along objects within carrying capacity and one willing creature of your size or smaller.
thunder-step.structuredState: Effect Type: UTILITY; no teleport movement or carried object/passenger fields.
thunder-step.jsonState: Runtime JSON has damage only and no teleport effect.
thunder-step.issue: Thunder Step teleport movement and carried object/passenger rules are not represented.
thunder-step.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport movement, carried object, and passenger fields.
thunder-step.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime TELEPORT/UTILITY movement effect with self, carried objects within capacity, and optional passenger.

tidal-wave.canonicalEvidence: Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw.
tidal-wave.structuredState: Save Stat: Dexterity; Save Outcome: half.
tidal-wave.jsonState: Runtime damage effect uses Dexterity save half and Prone uses Dexterity save negates_condition.
tidal-wave.issue: The save gates are represented; exact area dimensions and environmental water effects are tracked separately.
tidal-wave.recommendedTemplateChange: No save-field change required for this row.
tidal-wave.recommendedJsonChange: No save-condition runtime change required for this row.

tidal-wave.canonicalEvidence: On a failed save, a creature takes 4d8 bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a successful save it is not knocked prone.
tidal-wave.jsonState: Runtime STATUS_CONDITION Prone exists without fake escape/repeat defaults.
tidal-wave.issue: The knock-prone rider is represented as Prone, though it is categorized as status rather than forced movement.
tidal-wave.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate forced movement field required for this row.
tidal-wave.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by preserving the failed-save Prone rider and removing stale escape/repeat defaults.

tidal-wave.canonicalEvidence: The water then spreads out across the ground in all directions, extinguishing unprotected flames in its area and within 30 feet of it, and then it vanishes.
tidal-wave.structuredState: No water spread or flame extinguish fields.
tidal-wave.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no environmental extinguish effect.
tidal-wave.issue: Tidal Wave spreads water over ground and extinguishes unprotected flames in and near the area, but this is not represented.
tidal-wave.recommendedTemplateChange: Add water spread and flame extinguish radius fields.
tidal-wave.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange extinguishUnprotectedFlames in area and within 30 feet, then vanish.

tidal-wave.canonicalEvidence: You conjure up a wave of water that crashes down on an area within range.
tidal-wave.structuredState: Area Shape: line; Area Size: 30; no width/height fields.
tidal-wave.jsonState: Runtime area is Line size 30 height 0; width and height are missing.
tidal-wave.issue: Tidal Wave creates a configurable water volume up to 30 x 10 x 10 feet, but runtime only has a line length.
tidal-wave.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area width and height fields for cuboid/volume effects.
tidal-wave.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime area dimensions length 30, width 10, height 10.

tidal-wave.canonicalEvidence: You conjure up a wave of water ... the water then spreads out ... and then it vanishes.
tidal-wave.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no water lifecycle data.
tidal-wave.issue: The conjured water exists briefly, spreads, extinguishes flames, and vanishes; that lifecycle is not represented.
tidal-wave.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporary created substance lifecycle fields.

tidal-wave.canonicalEvidence: On a failed save, a creature is knocked prone; on a successful save, it is not knocked prone.
tidal-wave.jsonState: Runtime STATUS_CONDITION Prone is Dexterity-save gated.
tidal-wave.issue: The failed-save Prone state is represented.
tidal-wave.recommendedTemplateChange: No status field change required for this row.
tidal-wave.recommendedJsonChange: No status runtime change required after stale default removal.

tidal-wave.canonicalEvidence: The water then spreads out across the ground in all directions, extinguishing unprotected flames in its area and within 30 feet of it, and then it vanishes.
tidal-wave.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no environmental effect.
tidal-wave.issue: The flame-extinguishing water spread is not represented.
tidal-wave.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental water spread and extinguish fields.
tidal-wave.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange for spread, extinguish unprotected flames, and vanish.

tiny-servant.canonicalEvidence: As a bonus action, you can mentally command the creature if it is within 120 feet of you.
tiny-servant.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
tiny-servant.issue: The detector matched action language; the actual mechanic is a bonus-action command channel for the servant.
tiny-servant.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled summon command action/range fields.
tiny-servant.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime commandAction bonus_action range 120 feet mental.
